actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Atletico Madrid striker Antoine Griezmann has signed a new contract.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A bridge in Denbighshire has been restored.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A mysterious noise has been heard in the Canadian Arctic.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Wolves defender Dominic Iorfa has joined Ipswich Town.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The RSPCA is urging people not to buy reptiles as pets.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Two men and a woman have been arrested in connection with the murder of a man in Somerset.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A convicted murderer who escaped from prison has been found.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman has died after a crash on the A21 near Sedlescombe.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: China A beat Wales 5-1 in the World Cup of Snooker quarter-finals.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woolly rhino fossil has been discovered in Kent.
